prestazioni: 1UZ-FE 4.0L V8 naturally aspirated engine (32-valve, quad-cam) upgraded with a HKS GT-SS turbo kit featuring a Garrett GT35R turbocharger, HKS 264°/264° camshafts, and a Tomei 80mm titanium exhaust manifold with 3-inch downpipe and custom HKS Hi-Power exhaust system

Full Tomei Powered intake system with individual throttle bodies (ITBs), HKS Super Power Flow air filter, and custom 3-inch velocity stacks paired with a GReddy intercooler and HKS SSQV blow-off valve for forced induction response

Haltech Elite 2500 standalone ECU with custom dyno-tuned map for 98 RON fuel, supporting a 12.5:1 compression ratio, HKS 750cc fuel injectors, Walbro 450 LPH fuel pump, and AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor for precise AFR monitoring
estetica: Veilside Fortune 99 widebody conversion kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front bumper lip, and rear diffuser, all painted in Toyota Super White II (040) with matte black accents

TRD-inspired custom front grille with a 3D-printed honeycomb mesh insert, LED DRLs from Morimoto XB, and a custom carbon fiber hood featuring a functional heat extractor and dual NACA ducts for the 1UZ-FE engine bay

Work Meister S1 3P 19x10 +15 front and 19x11 +20 rear wheels with custom gold powder coating, wrapped in 275/30R19 and 305/25R19 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, paired with Tein Mono Flex Z coilovers and Cusco front/rear strut bars
